title: baphia incerta subsp. incerta
intro: Baphia incerta subsp. incerta is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the bushveld pea or wild pea. It is native to South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Baphia incerta subsp. incerta is often used as a decoction or infusion, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
